market_context: Markets face significant headwinds with Treasury yields at one-year highs amid Iran war inflation concerns. Fed rate hike odds jumped to 45% as oil prices surge and geopolitical tensions persist. NVIDIA earnings Wednesday create binary outcome potential for tech sector.

predictions.reasoning: Treasury yields hitting one-year highs at 4.63% with Fed rate hike odds at 45% creates significant headwind for equities. Pre-market Dow futures down -535 points to 49,617 signals broad market weakness driven by inflation concerns from Iran conflict.

KeyBanc raised price target to $300 expecting strong Q1 results Wednesday with 150k-200k Blackwell GPU shipments adding $5-7B revenue. Options market pricing 8-10% move with 90% probability of earnings beat on Polymarket creates positive momentum ahead of print.

Tech-heavy index faces pressure from rising yields despite NVIDIA strength. Broader tech selloff Friday with QQQ down 1.69% in pre-market shows vulnerability to rate hike fears. Rising bond yields create multiple compression headwinds for growth stocks.

Rocket Lab up 4.1% in pre-market after beating Q1 earnings expectations May 7th. Stock near all-time high of $133.18 with aerospace momentum continuing. Defense/space stocks often benefit during geopolitical tensions as Iran conflict persists.

Energy sector benefits from oil price surge with WTI up 4.2% amid Iran conflict. Strait of Hormuz closure continues disrupting 20% of global oil supply. IEA warns commercial inventories depleting rapidly with only weeks of supply remaining, supporting energy stock momentum.
